post_fix_for: VIB-3587 Curve single-sided LP_OPEN declares funded legs (no zero-leg)
VIB-5420 Curve LP USD valuation via live virtual_price (PortfolioValuer)
_provenance.note: Re-baselined for VIB-5420 (LP6 FAIL->PASS, passed 15->16): the PortfolioValuer now values a Curve LP position via the new _reprice_curve_lp_enriched path (lp_balance x live virtual_price x $1 USD peg) instead of the stale strategy-reported estimate. That path stamps `liquidity` and `lp_balance` into the position-state snapshot details, which is exactly what LP6 (liquidity-over-time) reads -- so LP6 moves from inapplicable-FAIL to PASS for the fungible Curve LP (the LP-token balance IS its liquidity measure; no concentrated-liquidity ticks are needed). Real-fork proof: tests/reports/curve_nleg_valuation_anvil_vib5420_report.md (virtual_price=1.0398 live, value_usd=10.0059 = lp_balance x vp x $1). LP1/LP2 remain inapplicable-FAIL (tick exposure / in-range-time DO NOT APPLY to a fungible StableSwap pool). G6 (native-gas-in-equity reconciliation, VIB-4256) and LP4 (single-sided IL undefined -> XFAIL) are out of scope for VIB-5420 and unchanged. Prior VIB-3587 history: single-sided USDC deposit, typed PrimitiveMoneyLegs, G13/G14/G15/LP5 forward (passed 11->15).
